mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", bim_project_id AS "bimProjectId", description AS "description", sim_config AS "simConfig", status AS "status", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM integration_project WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", bim_project_id AS "bimProjectId", description AS "description", sim_config AS "simConfig", status AS "status", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM integration_project WHERE wbs_project_id = #{wbsProjectId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", bim_project_id AS "bimProjectId", description AS "description", sim_config AS "simConfig", status AS "status", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM integration_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO integration_project (project_id, project_name, wbs_project_id, bim_project_id, description) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{wbsProjectId}, #{bimProjectId}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE integration_project SET project_name = COALESCE(#{projectName}, project_name), wbs_project_id = #{wbsProjectId}, bim_project_id = #{bimProjectId}, description = COALESCE(#{description}, description), status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
UPDATE integration_project SET sim_config = #{simConfig}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
